desc.title: Upgrade path between major versions of SUSE Linux Enterprise
desc.p: The Distribution Migration System provides an upgrade path for an installed SUSE Linux Enterprise system from one major version to another, for example, from SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 12 SP4 to SUSE Linux Enterprise Server 15. For a Service Pack upgrade from one Service Pack (SP) to another within a given major version release series the existing Zypper migration workflow provides the supported upgrade path. The distribution migration system provides the ability to upgrade across major distributions without the need to use the next major version installation media to perform the system upgrade.
